data.body:
[10/31 Update Gift Notice]

The 2-year anniversary pre-reg. gift has arrived, Sensei!
Log in every day and receive loads of Pyroxenes!

🗓️Event Schedule: 10/31 (Tue) maintenance - 11/7 (Tue) 2:59 PM (UTC)
